item.title: Buffers
item.description: H2 Hello friends! H3 I built an LFO! Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Ut vestibulum sodales varius. In id rutrum ligula. Nulla commodo non lacus in mattis. Suspendisse pretium semper quam non fringilla. Donec maximus augue et porta porttitor. Vivamus vel lobortis magna, eget consectetur odio. Integer sit amet mauris vulputate, venenatis metus porta, finibus diam. Vestibulum risus ante, consequat in auctor condimentum, rutrum in metus. Donec at velit euismod nulla malesuada blandit at quis tellus.

item.title: RC filters
item.description: A what? An RC filter is a low-pass filter consisting of nothing more than a resistor and a capacitor!

item.title: LFO

item.title: About SoundsBrown
item.description: This site is intended as a collection of personal notes regarding my DIY synth projects.
